question: Which product are listed in orders most frequently? List the id, product name and price.
sql: SELECT Products.product_id, Products.product_name, Products.product_price FROM Products JOIN Order_Items ON Products.product_id = Order_Items.product_id GROUP BY Products.product_id ORDER BY COUNT(Order_Items.order_item_id) DESC LIMIT 1;

semantic.reason: 语义一致。原始问题要求找出在订单中出现频率最高的产品，SQL描述通过统计Order_Items表中每个产品的订单项数量（COUNT(order_item_id)）并按降序排序取第一条，准确实现了该意图。目标字段(id, product_name, price)和分组逻辑均匹配。
